name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.18 adds opt-in auto-GC on SessionStart via CC_ENSLAVER_AUTO_GC_DAYS=N: prunes session-state files older than N days, 24h rate-limited via marker file. Shares prune_old_sessions() with the manual /cc-enslaver:gc command; failing-open everywhere; marker file itself protected from GC.
